title: Parser cleanup
body:
A bunch of code cleanups in the main compiler parser and lexor:

1. Convert the remaining old-style indentation in parse.y to the new style.
2. Eliminate the inconsistencies in naming and implementation of the two yywarn/VLwarn variants.
3. Be more consistent in error and warning message format:
a) Always prefix with "error: ", "warning: ", or "sorry: ".
b) Capitalise the first word of the main message unless it is a keyword.
4. Prefer VLerror/VLwarn to other methods of output in the lexor.
